scenes.speech: Computers can understand Japanese and English! How?
scenes.title: Natural Language Processing

scenes.speech: Technology for computers to understand human language!
scenes.title: What is NLP?
scenes.content: NLP lets computers understand and generate human language. Used in translation, search engines, and chatbots!

scenes.title: Tokenization
scenes.content: 'The cat sat' → 'The', 'cat', 'sat'. This is the first step in NLP!

scenes.title: Word Embeddings
scenes.content: 'King' - 'Man' + 'Woman' = 'Queen'! Word2Vec represents meaning as numbers — revolutionary!

scenes.title: Sentiment Analysis
scenes.content: 'This movie is amazing!' → Positive. 'Terrible waste of time' → Negative. Used in review sites and stock prediction!

scenes.title: Machine Translation
scenes.content: Google Translate handles over 100 billion words daily! The Transformer architecture dramatically improved translation quality.

scenes.title: Question Answering
scenes.content: Search engines, Siri, Alexa — all use question answering. They find answers from massive text collections!

scenes.title: Text Generation
scenes.content: ChatGPT can write essays, poems, code, emails — anything! GPT-4 has hundreds of billions of parameters!

scenes.title: How ChatGPT Works
scenes.content: Trained on massive internet text, it predicts the next word over and over to generate natural responses. Simple but revolutionary!
scenes.highlight: Next word prediction × billions = Natural language

scenes.speech: You understand the connection between language and AI now!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
